ExtensionMethodsWithFkWhereClause Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Overload List
  NameDescription
WithFkWhereClauseT(T, String, String, IFkWhereClauseProvider)
Configures a dynamic WHERE clause that limits the objects that can be assigned as a foreign-key value.
WithFkWhereClauseT(T, String, String, FuncIFkWhereClauseContext, String)
Configures a dynamic WHERE clause that limits the objects that can be assigned as a foreign-key value.
WithFkWhereClauseT(T, String, String, FuncIFkWhereClauseContext, CancellationToken, TaskString)
Configures a dynamic WHERE clause that limits the objects that can be assigned as a foreign-key value.
WithFkWhereClauseT(T, String, String, String)
Configures a static WHERE clause that limits the objects that can be assigned as a foreign-key value.
